I am sorry, but this entry cannot be inserted into the FreeBSD archive. 
If you want to have your entry added, please have a look at other entries 
and submit something similiar. Also from the quick look at the text I 
didn't see someting about FreeBSD, can you suggest where that can be found? 
Thanks.
